It was 1938 when reverberations of the Industrial Revolution had not yet reached the interiors of South India. Despite scarce capital and resources, Shri P.A.C. Ramasamy Raja had setup the first Spinning Mill at Rajapalayam, which later became the focal point of the Ramco Group. His sharp focus on technology and quality has inspired a generation of entrepreneurs and formed the basis for the collective vision of the Group

Under the stewardship of our Founder Chairman Shri P.R. Ramasubrahmaneya Rajha, son of Shri P.A.C. Ramasamy Raja, the Ramco Group has expanded into a USD 1 Billion industrial conglomerate with interests spanning cotton and synthetic yarn, cement, building products, software solutions, wind-energy, education and more. It continues to grow under the visionary leadership of our present Chairman Shri. P.R. Venketrama Raja. The Group has become one of the most reputed business houses in India and has achieved international recognition for its quality products and services.
Ramco Institute of Technology, (RIT) is fully supported by the Ramco group to create quality Engineers for future needs.

Shri P.A.C. Ramasamy Raja, the founder of RAMCO Group, was one of the foremost visionary industrialists and philanthropists. He made a lasting contribution to the development of society by setting up industries and educational institutions. He founded P.A.C. Ramasamy Raja Education Charity Trust in 1950 and Raja Charity Trust in 1951. A number of educational institutions function under the aegis of these Trusts including a Polytechnic College, Industrial Training Centre and social organizations located in and around Rajapalayam. Shri P.R. Ramasubrahmaneya Rajha, the Founder Chairman of RAMCO Group, carries forward the mission started by his visionary father. More than 10000 students are being benefitted by the Trust.

Ramco Institute of Technology, promoted by Raja Charity Trust, is established during the academic year 2013-14.The Institution is approved by AICTE and affiliated to Anna University, Chennai. Currently it offers 4-year undergraduate Engineering programmes, and plans to offer 2-year postgraduate Engineering and research programmes. The overall management of the Institution is vested with the Governing Council under the able leadership of Shri P.R.Venketrama Raja, Chairman, RAMCO Group of Industries.

The Advisory Committee of the Institute is headed by Prof. M.S. Ananth, former Director of IIT Madras, and leading Professors of IIT Madras, former Vice-Chancellor of Open University and other prominent academicians. The Advisory Committee plays vital role in selecting and recruiting the best of available as faculty members, training and encouraging those who have an inclination towards research in the engineering field for innovative teaching.
The students from the above institutions consistently secure District Ranks, State Ranks and we take pride in stating that most of our students enter into the professional education stream.

Further, P.A.C. Ramasamy Raja Polytechnic College, Rajapalayam, is one of the premier Govt. Aided technical institutions in Tamil Nadu, which is an accredited institution providing quality technical education since its inception (1963). Its reputation as a technical institution par excellence is well established and deservingly it has been recognized as one of the best in the Country, as its courses (accredited by NBA) are being offered under autonomous curriculum

RIT is an Institution of difference as it is guided by a prominent Governing Council consisting of academic experts such as Prof.M.S.Ananth, former Director, IIT Madras and other renowned academicians and industry experts. At RIT, we lay emphasis on imparting wholesome engineering education using modern teaching techniques blended with a very good practical exposure through regular industrial visits and training at the Ramco Group of industries in order to create able Engineers with sound practical knowledge ready for taking-up challenging tasks in core areas of engineering. Keeping this in mind, we have created spacious physical infrastructure with most modern laboratory facilities and recruited experienced faculty members qualified from prominent Universities and Institutions of par excellence to facilitate a good learning environment.leading industrial conglomerate, we endeavour to provide a world-class educational experience to our students and enable them to transform into successful graduates with life-long learning skills for leading a fulfilling human life.

I congratulate you for joining RIT educational family to experience the best in engineering education and let us contribute to make RIT an Institution of Excellence in Engineering Education and Research.

I am pleased to inform you that, RAMCO Institute of  Technology (RIT) has been established to offer value based quality engineering education to the young talented boys and girls of the present generation. RIT is a unique institute with a difference from other engineering institutions, guided by prominent Governing Council and Advisory Committee consists of eminent academicians such as Prof.M.S.Ananth, Former Director of IIT, Madras, Prof.M.S.Palanisamy Former VC of Tamilnadu Open University and others.

The Advisory Committee selects highly talented academic faculty members who impart wholesome engineering education using modern teaching learning methodology, giving more emphasis on practical education relevant to industry needs. The faculty members update their knowledge by pursuing online courses offered by overseas Universities and the knowledge gained through the courses are used for their teaching. The faculty members are committed to provide quality education to the students who join RIT.

The excellent infrastructure created at RIT provides a conductive learning atmosphere. RIT provides the right ambiance for the students to have world class education and helps them transform into highly talented graduates capable of life-long learning.
I invite aspiring students to join RIT for experiencing the best engineering education and to prosper in their life.

Welcome to Ramco family. The Ramco group has been serving the society by promoting education through its schools and colleges and also by providing employment in their industries since 1938. RAMCO is known for its quality products and services across the nation and the world. The competencies of the students of Ramco group of institutions are well recognized.

RIT is driven by the motto, Vidhya Vindhathe Viryam which means Knowledge Empowers. The college right from its inception has focused on producing engineers worthy of employment. The students of RIT are given a strong platform to pursue higher studies across the globe. Our students are also trained to become successful entrepreneurs. The infrastructure, human resource and administration are set up with utmost care and planning with the advice of the members of the governing council comprising of learned professors from Indian Institute of Technology, Commissioner of Technical Education of TN, Experts nominated by AICTE and Anna University, Former Vice Chancellor of Tamilnadu Open University, Chief Executives and experienced professionals from industries. Keeping up the top rank continuously in the pass percentage of Anna University and a sizeable number of placements reveal the progress of RIT.

RIT is the right place for engineering students to learn fundamentals, acquire knowledge and excel in their career. We, the members of RIT, are committed to ensure quality and discipline. We are sure that the students of RIT will reach greater status with the rich learning experience they gain in our campus.

It is my privilege to welcome you to Ramco Institute of Technology (RIT), an institution committed to academic excellence, innovation, and value-based education. With over three decades of experience in teaching, research, and academic administration, I firmly believe that engineering education must transcend conventional boundaries and equip students with knowledge, skills, ethics, and a sense of social responsibility.          At RIT, Outcome-Based Education (OBE) forms the foundation of our academic framework. Our curriculum, teaching methodologies, and assessment practices are aligned with well-defined graduate attributes, ensuring measurable learning outcomes and continual improvement. The institution has consistently sustained accreditation from the National Board of Accreditation (NBA) for all eligible programmes and recognition from the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC), reflecting our steadfast commitment to quality, transparency, and academic rigor.       We have adopted the globally recognized CDIO Initiative (ConceiveDesignImplementOperate) to enrich experiential learning. A significant milestone in our academic journey is our collaboration with premier institutions such as IITs and NITs. These partnerships have strengthened our research culture, enhanced student innovation capabilities, and improved placement readiness through exposure to cutting-edge technologies and real-world applications.         Research and innovation are integral to the RIT ecosystem. Through funded projects from national agencies, advanced research laboratories, patents, consultancy initiatives, and interdisciplinary collaborations, we strive to contribute meaningfully to technological advancement and societal development. Our faculty members play vital roles as academic leaders, reviewers, mentors, and contributors to curriculum development at both university and national levels.       Quality assurance at RIT is fortified through the implementation of the ISO Quality Management System, which institutionalizes systematic planning, execution, monitoring, and continuous improvement across academic and administrative processes. Our internal quality mechanisms ensure stakeholder participation, data-driven decision-making, and sustained institutional growth.       At RIT, our goal is to nurture engineers who are technically competent, ethically grounded, socially responsible, and globally competitive. We continue to strengthen industry-institute partnerships, alumni engagement, and community outreach activities to support the holistic development of our students.            I warmly invite all stake holders-students, parents, faculty, alumni, industry partners, and the wider community-to join us in our mission to cultivate innovative professionals and responsible citizens. Together, let us build a future driven by knowledge, compassion, integrity, and excellence.

The Department of Civil Engineering was established in the year 2013. At present, it offers undergraduate programme, B.E. in Civil Engineering with a sanctioned intake of 60 students. The Department broadly covers important fields such as Surveying, Geotechnical Engineering, Structural Engineering, Hydraulics and Water Resources Engineering, Construction Materials and Practices, Environmental Engineering and Transportation Engineering. The Department has well established modern laboratories to cater to the needs of academic and research activities. The laboratories of the department include Concrete and Highway Engineering Laboratory, Surveying Laboratory, Environmental Engineering Laboratory, Soil Mechanics Laboratory, Hydraulic Engineering Laboratory, Strength of Materials Laboratory, CAD  Digitalized Construction Laboratory, RIT - Centre of Excellence for Building Information Modelling (BIM), RIT ICT Academy Centre of Excellence for Design Powered by Autodesk, Construction Practices Laboratory, Centre for Geospatial Technology, Project & Consultancy Laboratory. Our Department has Anna University recognized R&D Centre from the month of January 2024 which enables us to recruit and guide PhD scholars. The Department has well-qualified and committed faculty members, lab technicians and modern infrastructure in the form of elegant and smart classrooms, spacious laboratories, latest machinery and equipment. Students are encouraged to participate in co-curricular and extra-curricular activities to acquire leadership qualities. The Department is very active in Industrial collaboration by signing MoU with prominent organisations like Land Coordinates Technology, L&T EduTech, TechApps Consulting, Pyramid IAS Academy, Builders Association of India (BAI), V-Invent Chemilab Private Limited, Ramco Cements Ltd., etc., to bridge the gap between academia and industry. Through initiatives like guest lectures, conferences, seminars, webinars, industrial and site visits, as well as regular value-added courses, the Department ensures students remain updated on recent advancements in Civil Engineering. Additionally, a strong industry-institute interaction is maintained by providing consultancy and testing services in various domains.  The Department encompasses professional societies such as Indian Concrete Institute (ICI), Institution of Engineers IE(I) India, Indian Chapter of American Concrete Institute (ACI), Indian Green Building Council (IGBC) which provides students a platform to acquire knowledge in various technical activities. The Civil Engineering Association RIT STRUCTA serves as a platform for students to make technical presentations, gain knowledge about recent advancements and bring together novel ideas.

The Department of Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) started in the academic year 2025 - 2026, is committed to providing high-quality technical education, research and innovation in the field of Computer Science and the AI domain. In order to give students a solid core foundation in computer science and a thorough understanding of the latest developments in AI and ML technologies. The department offers a four-year undergraduate degree program in B.E. Computer Science and Engineering with a specialization in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.This course prepares students for thriving careers in the rapidly evolving fields of AI and ML domains, which are revolutionizing industries globally and creating a high demand for skilled professionals. The CSE (AI & ML) curriculum delivers an integration of academic foundations and practical skills, combining modern AI technologies with fundamental computer science and engineering concepts. The curriculum also emphasizes experiential learning through workshops, internships, projects, case studies and group research. The department is equipped with the modern infrastructure supports it, including industry-standards software tools, high-performance computing servers, AI-optimized computer laboratories, and fast internet service. Digital learning platforms such as EdX, Coursera, NPTEL, and MITx are integrated into the program to enhance conceptual understanding and support the continuous upskilling of students through access to advanced courses and global learning resources.The department strives to develop an environment that is internationally competitive through dedicated faculty members, technical support people, and a research-driven strategy. Our aim is to create future-ready professionals who can use AI and ML to solve practical problems and significantly impact the global digital economy.

Our Institute has established a full-fledged Training and Placement Centre (TPC) for facilitating the students for campus placement. The facilities include a Conference Hall of seating capacity 350 for conducting PPT and other events, a Discussion Room and 10 numbers of Interview Rooms. All these rooms are designed good interiors, ambience provided with networking and other essential facilities.

Training is an essential component to enable students equip with the desired skills to get decent placement in Companies/Corporates/Industries/Organisations. The Training calendar is designed to the needs of the students to enhance their employability. Training on communication skills is designed and executed with the help of Experts for all students, starting from first year onwards to meet the standard of industry expectations. Career focus events are arranged to help students to set their target from second year onwards so that they would get adequate time for competence development. Career Awareness programmes are arranged for all second year students to make them aware of all career options and competence expected by industries.

Students are also groomed to become able Engineers with relevant skills needed to get employed. Students are trained to meet the Industry expectations and develop confidence to face the companies selection process that includes Aptitude test, Group discussion and Personal interview. Eminent Human Resource Executives from various Industries are invited frequently to give guidance on the expectations of Industries from fresh Graduates/Engineers. Students are well informed and guided to set their goals and mentored to achieve it. Students get complete guidance from TPC about preparing for placement in their chosen field or corporate or industry.

Various placement training programmes such as solving Aptitude questions, Group Discussion skills, Interview Techniques, Resume preparation, etc., are arranged for all third year students to equip well to participate in campus recruitment interviews. The Training and Placement Centre makes every effort to network with all segments of industries ranging from Manufacturing to Software. Fruitful relationships with industries are being nourished with utmost care for mutual benefit. Partnerships with reputed national and multinational companies are also initiated for adding values in the competence development process of students.

TPC also provides the Students guidance on higher studies, preparing and writing various entrance examinations like CAT, GATE, GMAT, BEC, GRE, TOFEL to pursue higher education in Engineering, Technology and Management streams.

RIT Library is located in the first floor of Main Block and it is spread over 404 sq.m. The Library has a good collection of books covering various branches of Engineering, Humanities & Science and other books related to Competitive Examinations. The Library has Acquisition Section, Technical Section, Circulation Section, Reference Section, Periodical Section and Digital Library Section. The Air-conditioned Reading Hall of Library can accommodate around 150 members at time.

Library materials and services are automated using KOHA Integrated Library Automation Software. All the transactions are fully computerized. The bar-coded ID and the Scanner are used for charging and discharging the books and Web OPAC facilities are also available. The software contains various modules such as Enquiry, Circulation, Administration, and self-renewal, etc., An Web OPAC (Web Online Public Access Catalogue) has been created and 1 terminal is provided to facilitate access to the library resources, and 1 terminal for the e-gate register.
Web OPAC (Web Online Public Access Catalog  http://172.16.1.104/

The Indian Access Management Federation (INFED) has adopted Shibboleth, a standard-based open source software, for authenticating authorized users from institutions and providing them seamless access to e-resources from anywhere, anytime. Shibboleth offers a mechanism for users to access multiple resources within a federated single sign-on framework. The goal of the INFED is to allow users to access internal and external resources seamlessly using a single, institutionally controlled identity. This would not only allow authorized users to access e-resources from anywhere, anytime, but would also circumvent the requirement of maintaining multiple passwords for multiple resources in multiple domains. Our RIT Library provides remote access facilities to faculty members and students to enhance research and education. The RIT Library has created a user ID based on an email address for remote/mobile access to e-journals subscribed by our institute.  A notification email will be received from sgou.idp@mail.inflibnet.ac.in after creating a username and password.
These e-journals can be accessed outside the RIT campus 24/7 through INFED (INFLIBNET) Remote Access.
For any assistance / query, please feel free to contact Librarian.

The Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE) is the leading National Professional non-profit making Society for the Technical Education System in our country with the motto of Career Development of Teachers and Personality Development of Students and overall development of our Technical Education System.

Our Institute has joined as Institutional member of ISTE in the year 2014.  At present our institute has a very large and an effective membership base consisting of more than 100 life members and 1651 student members. RIT-ISTE Faculty and Student Chapter was inaugurated by Dr.Raghu.V.Prakash, Professor, IIT Madras on 20.02.2015.

The major objective of the ISTE is to provide quality training programmes to teachers and administrators of technical institutions to update their knowledge and skills in their fields of activity and to assist and contribute in the production and development of top quality professional engineers and technicians needed by the industry and other organisations.

To Provide a Suitable Environment to Motivate the Youth to Take Up a Career in the Armed Forces. To Develop Character, Comradeship, Discipline, Leadership, Secular Outlook, Spirit of Adventure, and Ideals of Selfless Service amongst the Youth of the Country.

I DO HERE BY SOLEMNLY PROMISE THAT I WILL SERVE MY MOTHERLAND MOST TRULY AND LOYALLY, AND THAT, I WILL ABIDE BY THE RULES AND REGULATION OF THE NATIONAL CADET CORPS. FURTHER, UNDER THE COMMAND AND CONTROL OF MY COMMANDING OFFICER, I WILL PARTICIPATE IN EVERY CAMP MOST SINCERELY AND WHOLE-HEARTEDLY.

WE THE CADET OF THE NATIONAL CADET CORPS, DO SOLEMNLY PLEDGE THAT WE SHALL ALWAYS UPHOLD THE UNITY OF INDIA. WE RESOLVE TO BE DISCIPLINED AND RESPONSIBLE CITIZEN OF OUR NATION. WE SHALL UNDERTAKE POSITIVE COMMUNITY SERVICE IN THE SPIRIT OF SELFLESSNESS AND CONCERN FOR OUR FELLOW BEINGS.

THE INTER-SERVICE CHARACTER OF THE NCC IS REFLECTED IN ITS FLAG. THE NCC FLAG WAS INTRODUCED IN 1954. THERE ARE THREE COLOURS IN THE FLAG, NAMELY, RED, NAVY BLUE AND SKY BLUE, FROM LEFT TO RIGHT (WHEN YOU ARE FACING THE FLAG). THE RED COLOUR IS FOR THE ARMY, NAVY BLUE FOR THE NAVY AND SKY BLUE FOR THE AIR WING. THE LETTERS NCC WRITTEN IN GOLDEN YELLOW COLOUR IN THE CREST ARE ENCIRCLED BY A BLOSSOMED LOTUS WREATH. THE TWO DOTS IN THE MIDDLE OF THE UPPER END OF THE WREATH REPRESENT THE TWO PREMIER TRAINING INSTITUTES OF THE NCC, I.E., THE OFFICERS TRAINING ACADEMY AT KAMPTEE, FOR TRAINING MALE ASSOCIATE NCC OFFICERS AND WOMEN OFFICERS TRAINING ACADEMY AT GWALIOR, FOR TRAINING LADY ASSOCIATE NCC OFFICERS AND INSTRUCTORS.

NCC (National Cadet Corps) is a Tri-Services organization the Army, Navy and Air Force, engaged in grooming the youth  The Leaders of tomorrow into disciplined and patriotic citizens. After independence the present day NCC under the Ministry of Defence came into existence on 16 Apr 1948 through NCC act XXXl,1948.

NCC was formally inaugurated on 15 Jul 1948 as soon as the schools and colleges reopened after summer vacation. Now there are 17 NCC directorates that has been established all over India. In 1950 Air Wing was added on 01 Apr with one Air Squadron each at Bombay and Kolkata.

At present, there are 58 Air Squadrons i.e. 47 Flying Squadrons & 11 Technical Squadrons. Now at present there are 47,578 SD Cadets and 11,489 JD Cadets all over India except in Jammu & Kashmir. The major objective of the air wing is to create interest among the youth of the country in aviation activities. In the Flying Squadrons,  Besides normal training, cadets are imparted training in gliding/Microliter activities.
The cadets are imparted basic knowledge in aviation subjects like Aerodynamics, Navigation, Airmanship, Meteorology and Aero engine.
The camp training constitutes the most important part of NCC training where they are taught camaraderie, team work, self-reliance and dignity of labour among cadets.

Various camps conducted by the NCC are Annual Training Camps(ATC), Centrally Organized camps(COC), leadership camps, Vayu sainik camp (Air Wing Cadets), Nau sainik camp (Naval wing cadets), Rock Climbing camps, National Integration Camps (NIC), Thal Sainik Camp (TSC) Republic Day camp (RDC) & Prime Ministers(PMs) Rally and other attachment training camps.

NCC Senior Division Army wing was established in our institution in affiliation with 5 TN Sig Coy NCC, Rajapalayam with a sanctioned intake of 50 cadets. The main objective of raising NCC is to develop organized, trained, and motivated youth. As a Cadet being in NCC for a period of three years, he/she will be privileged to attend various training camps, drills which will develop his/her overall qualities. The candidates with NCC 'C' certificate will have special entry schemes for joining Indian armed forces and are called directly for SSB interview. The students enrolled for NCC will undergo drills, training, and camps as per NCC requirements to appear for B and C certificate examination. These cadets will undergo regular parades, training as per NCC norms for a period of three years. The cadet must have attended a minimum of 75% of total training periods laid down in the syllabus for the first and second years for Senior Division/Wing NCC to appear for the B certificate exam. Based on that, a training timetable which includes parade classes as well as theory classes was prepared and submitted to the unit. Mr.K.Amudhan, Assistant Professor, Department of Mechanical Engineering has been registered as the NCC Caretaker for the unit.

The National Cadet Corps is headed by a Director General, an Army Officer of the rank of Lieutenant General, who is responsible for the functioning of the National Cadet Corps in the country through the National Cadet Corps Headquarters situated at Delhi. At the State Level, the country has been divided into 17 Directorates covering all States and Union Territories. Each of the State National Cadet Corps Directorate Headquarters controls two to fourteen Group Headquarters. While Directorates are commanded by Brigadiers or their equivalents, the Groups are commanded by Colonels or equivalents from the Air Force and the Navy, NCC Units are commanded by Major/Lieutenant Colonel or their equivalents.

The RIT-RedHat Academy is a technical forum for RIT students. RIT-RedHat Academy was started in the academic year 20212022. It is a platform that aims to bridge the gap between education and industry and boost students' knowledge on an open-source platform while also giving them the opportunity to interact with industry leaders. Red Hat Academy partners with academic institutions around the world to provide the next generation of IT talent with free access to a range of Red Hats training courses and certification exams. RIT-RedHat Academy benefits students and educational institutions alike by offering a comprehensive curriculum, hands-on instruction, immersive labs, and performance-based testing. The Association RIT-RedHat Academy encourages students to train on the Linux platform and take value-added Linux certification exams.
